game.title: Fish n Chips
game.short_text: A Fish Tower Defense Game where you can merge towers

details.title: Fish n Chips
details.description:
Fish n Chips 
(Desktop Version recommended)

Introduction:        
        Fish n Chips is a tower defense game where the Fish and the Chips put aside their differences to help protect the Nimbus Tower from the spirits of animals (and British food for some reasons) 
        The Fish are weaker but strong in numbers while the chips have the technology but lack versatility. Combine the powers (and units!!) of the two race to defend against 30 waves of relentless animal spirits. What to expect: 
8 Towers (2 Fish, 2 Chips and 4 Fish n Chips)
30 Waves of enemies
7 Enemies
1 Map and 1 Difficulty (damn)
A bunch of jokes about food and computer science

How to Play:
        Like any other tower defense game BUT you can click and drag certain towers to merge them together! (more specifically fish and chips, get it?)
 Lore: 
        Many years after humans transfer their consciousness into the Nimbus Tower, marine animals rise up with the sea levels and cover all lands. Over time, what seems to be spirits begin rising up from the depths of the ocean, towards the Nimbus Tower. The marine animals and computer chips were force to help each other.


a submission to the FishFest game jam
made by:
HKendo (Programmer)Ralphar (Game Designer) TARA A-RAT (Music and Art)

game.title: Bottom of the Blue
game.short_text: An immersive underwater exploration game playing as a blue tang

details.title: Bottom of the Blue
details.description:
Dive into "Bottom of the Blue", an immersive underwater exploration game where you navigate the deep sea as a blue tang, uncovering hidden secrets and immerse yourself in the atmospheric underwater world.

Overview
In this 3D game you explore an open underwater world to unlock as much achievements as possible. But beware to not swim too far out, because you might be easy catch for predators.
The goal in this game is to explore and have a good time.
You control the character by using W, S, A, D for movement and looking around with your mouse. With holding Shift, you have a limited sprint. Use Space to swim upwards and X/C to swim downwards.
Achievements are listed in the menu (ESC) where you only see the title and an image for unachieved entries.
Controls
W, S, A, D - movementMouse - look aroundShift - sprintingSpace - swim upX/C - swim downESC - open menuScroll mouse wheel - Zoom in/Zoom out
Behind the scenes
The game was developed using Godot Engine and C#. The graphical assets are made by myself. The sounds and music are third-party assets. This game was created in a week as a submission for the game jam "Fish Fest".
Downloads
Windows & Linux builds are successfully tested (Linux build was tested on Steam Deck and works if you configure your controls accordingly :)).

game.title: Fish Debt RPG
game.short_text: Pay your debt within 20 days as a fish

details.title: Fish Debt RPG
details.description:
Story
You are a Sign Eviota fish. Matured Eviota only lived for around 3 and a half weeks.Depressed by your short life, you signed a soul contract with the Fish Devil in exchange for a tons of cash.However, you burned all of them in gambling. Now with the thread of eternal torment in Fish-hell, you must find a way to pay the Fish Devil back .
Control
Use WASD to move around.Use Tab to open menu.Use E to interact with things.A day's time is divided in 8 periods. Works and Activities will take time.Go to your apartment to sleep and pay debt.
Hint
High reputation will multiply  your salary.Try focus on a workplace and climb the corporate ladder.You can steal money from friendly fish for a headstart, if you not get caught.
Credit
Main menu and game BGM: Bo en
Source code:  https://github.com/lamnguyenkhoa/fish-debt-rpg

game.title: A-SPLASH-KA
game.short_text: Help a lone Alaskan salmon navigate home

details.title: A-SPLASH-KA
details.description:
A-Splash-Ka is a game based on the annual fish migration event, the Salmon run, created for the Fish Fest. Set in Alaska, during the summer months, you play as a Salmon who is just about to return to the river where you were born. You must navigate swimming upstream while avoiding trash and other obstacles in order to return to where you were born. 
Created for Fish Fest over the course of 7 days.
Goal
The game is very short and typically takes around 60 seconds to complete, try to finish it as quickly as possible! 
Controls
You can control the movement of the salmon with WASD or the arrow keysJump with the Spacebar. 
Assets Used
Various from ShubibubiKeys from greatdocbrownAudio from HoliznaCC0
Browser Compatibility
Water shaders currently do not load in the browser, download the executable to view thoseAudio seems to work best in non-Chromium based browsersTo view this game with shaders you can download the .exe file and run it.

game.title: Floppy Fish
game.short_text: The fish goes flop

details.title: Floppy Fish
details.description:
FLOPPY FISH
Description
This is a game which you tests your limits. Scientists are conducting an experiment; they want to find out if fish are capable of more complex intelligence. You become Fish 725, the first fish to pass the initial examinations. You need to prove your intelligence to the scientists to show what fish are TRULY capable of. 
Use P or Esc (preferably P within the browser) to pause.Pretty sure the exit game buttons don't work because they were made for an application, so just don't use them.
Anything else
This is my first published game that I made in roughly 3 days and a half for April 2024 FishFest (slightly late). 
The game and the art are made by me. The sound effects were jointly made between me and my sister, Claudia. The music was made by Claudia (best part of the game not gonna lie).
The subtitles are slightly wonky in some places and it definitely has a lot of bugs to say the least, but hopefully its playable. Please tell me all of your thoughts, I'm very new to all this.
The videos "How to add sound effects the right way" by Sasquatch B and "Unity Subtitles for cutscenes with multiple lines/phrases" by Vincent Adinolfi were very useful. Do recommend.
Enjoy!

resultData.title: Fishy Business - Deals from the Deep

game.title: Fishy Business - Deals from the Deep
game.short_text: Experience the struggle of profit at the black market

details.title: Fishy Business - Deals from the Deep
details.description:
Fishy business - Deals from the Deep was made through the Fish Fest game jam.Manage your booth at the Black Market. Satisfy your customers' needs while sending out your fishing boats to haul in goods and fill your stock. All to hit the daily quota to please the Loan Sharks.
How to play FAQ
What's my goal? At the end of each day you must pay off your ever increasing debt. Survive 5 days and you win!
What are the controls? Left click to accept/decline offers and gather resources from ships. Right click and drag ships to move them to locations so they can begin harvesting. 
What should I do? Send out ships to fish. Gather fish. Sell fish. ????. Profit! Oh and be fast about it, when you start the day, the time starts tickin'. Just ring the bell to open up your shop!
How do I send out ships? Put your mouse near the left of the screen, and the map will show up. Drag the ships using right click to any location you fancy. But do keep in mind that some items are more easily obtained at different locations, click the anchor icon on the map to see where. Once the ships got exclamation marks above them, you can gather their loot!
How do I upgrade/buy new ships? Click the top left sign to open the ship menu. Pay dabloons to level up your ship or get new ones. 
What are those things popping up to the right? They're customers. Only 4 will stick around at once. Sell 'em goods and they'll give you money. Be quick cuz they're very impatient. Don't got what they need? Boot 'em out so more can come in.
I'm stuck in game, how do I quit? Alt + F4 babyyyyyyyyyyyyyy~

Credits
Lazy - Programmer / Design
Chikin - SFX / QA
Snurlsss - Art / UI
Heron - Art
Special thanks to:
Zapsplat - SFX
Loops - BGM

Play as a cute anglerfish exploring the perilous depths of the ocean, luring lesser fish into fighting for you! But beware—over time, your hunger grows, and your light dims. Will you risk battling your foes to feed, or will you cautiously consume your allies?

game.title: The Fissure
game.short_text: Take photos of aquatic creatures in an immersive deep-sea ecosystem to gather evidence about the mysterious fissure.

details.title: The Fissure
details.description:
Located on the precipice of “the fissure,” your job as a new recruit aboard the deep sea base, NOAH, is to take photos of ocean life. However, looking out into the abyss you feel as if something unknown may be lurking below. Discover the mystery of the affected environment and uncover what lies in “The Fissure.”
Gameplay
- Gather evidence by snapping pictures of multiple depths in an aquatic ecosystem.
- Earn points based on photo quality to upgrade your license.
- Document a variety of creatures, such as the clownfish, shark, shrimp, anglerfish, and more!

Submitted to the FishFest game jam in April 2024

details.title: I'd kiss THAT fish!
details.description:
This is a fish dressing game where you can let your creativity run wild and create a new OC, Mascot or Friend!

This game was originally made for the FishFest Jam!!! 🐟🐟🐟

Made by:
Programming & Shaders by cyps 👾

Art & Sprites by sugarcyube🎨
Music & SFX by calum 🎶


Shortcuts:
Duplicate Selected - Right click or Ctrl + D
Select All - Ctrl + A (Unselects all if already all selected)
Select Single - Ctrl + Click (Unselects if already selected)
Delete Selected - X or Delete
Shrink Selected - S or Mousewheel Down
Grow Selected - W or Mousewheel Up
Rotate Left - A or Mousewheel Down + Shift
Rotate Right - D or Mousewheel Up + Shift
Flip Horizontal - F
Flip Vertical - F + Shift
Send to above layer - Q
Send to below layer - E
Send to top layer - Q + Shift
Send to bottom layer - E + Shift

game.title: Catching a Date
game.short_text: You made a mistake and now there's fish to date.

details.title: Catching a Date
details.description:
"Dammit! If only it wasn't so easy to throw car batteries into the ocean!"
Note: Contains fast-moving images and one minor jumpscare, as well as extremely minor horror elements. You have been warned.
A fast-paced fishing/dating-sim game that can be played entirely with mouse!
Fish up phone numbers and get to meet new fish!
Build up your experience over time to score a date with one lucky (or unlucky) fish!
Get eaten by a shark! Wait, what?

Each run through the game takes around 4 minutes. Seriously, that's all the time you get.  Multiply that by the amount of endings you want to get.
A visual guide for those who need it:




If you're tired of talking to the same types of fish, just change your tackle and you'll meet plenty (6 total) new faces! Maybe there's one you don't want to meet?

If you're tired of the game (I don't blame you, I am too), just hit escape to pause whenever you're not in a menu or talking to someone.

also for the one person who will complain "ew windowed mode" just hit enter and it'll fullscreen.

Additional features include:

Outdated surrealist humor!
3 different artstyles! Maybe even 4 if you count the UI!
A terrible, terminally-online protagonist!
HD+++++ quality fish!
and even SECRET NPCS! (including a certain one who i will happily chuck at the wall :D)

Some things to consider:

Please try to get eaten by sharks in the open. The shark is so powerful... that it may break your game. And that would be suboptimal.
There are 7 endings, each with an optional CG. If you wish to get the CG, please try to maximize your experience with talking to fish before dating your favorite one.
Answers change over time as you talk to more fish. Always remember to read and pick the BEST answer, not just the one you've been picking this entire time if you want to actually date one.
yes it is on purpose that the fishing goes on without you. it is part of seth's terminally online powers of multitasking (i couldn't phrase this any other way without it sounding bad)
Credits:
Thank you to Henry, Atomic Ant, and notaShrineMaiden for playtesting.
Fonts used are Art Club and Open Sans.
Software used are Godot Engine, Firealpaca, and Garageband.
Thank you to Atomic Ant once again for this being the absolute mess that it is. Lastly, all other assets were made by me or recorded by me. Yes, even the art of the fish. And I programmed it but I think that was obvious.



thank you for reading. hope you enjoy the game.
Windows: Download the zip file, unzip by clicking "Extract all" or by right-clicking it and doing it from the context menu, and run it as normal (which is to say, double-click it and ignore all the warnings that Windows throws up if you want to play the game).
MacOS: just run it dudeHTML build contains no music because otherwise it'd be too large. I got no time to test it so I can only hope it works.
I can only guarantee that the Windows build works (to an extent) because I haven't extensively tested the latest version of the MacOS build.
By the way, don't reenact any of this IRL... making out with fish is probably illegal (I haven't checked) and throwing car batteries in the ocean is bad for the ocean (and probably your car).

game.title: Long live Tony!
game.short_text: Take care of your fish until their inevitable death in this pet sim meet rogue lite combo !

details.title: Long live Tony!
details.description:
Fish are adorable and deserve the best through their life!

That's why in Long live Tony! you take care of your fish to make them the happiest possible before the inevitable end of their life .
Feed them, wash them, play with them, keep them happy, but be careful! Your fish needs a lot of attention, neglecting them is not an option.
And to better your chances, there may be a way to gain a little bit of cash selling some old stuff lying around to purchase better tools and take care of a lot more fish even more demanding!

How  to play:
Use your mouse's cursor and left click to interact with the game. Earn the most amount of money after each run and take care of as many fish as you can!
Take the time to name your fish! Form a special bond with them, forever and ever.
The circular bars on the left will deplete over time based on different factors:
The moral circle will decrease if other circles are orange or red and will increase if all of them are green (except for the life circle).The food circle decreases over time and increases when feeding the fish.The hygiene circle will decrease based on the amount of smudge on the fish tank and will increase when they get cleaned.The entertainment circle decreases over time and increases when entertaining the fish.The life circle decreases over time and there is nothing you can do about that, it's inevitable.
If any of the circle bars decreases to 0, the run ends. The run is considered failed if the first circle bar to get to zero isn't the fish's life which will make you earn less money.
The icons at the bottom are the tools that allow you to take care of your fish:
The shop gives you access to upgrades for the other tools, making them more effective. Upgrades get carried on next runs.The food box allows you to feed your fish by clicking over the fish tank.The Sponge allows you to clean the fish tank by moving back and forth over the smudges.The Hula hoop allows you to entertain your fish.
Different fish have different stats, the pricier they get, the harder it is to keep the circle bars up. They also live longer and give more reward at the end of the run.
Also, please, don't tap on the glass. The fish doesn't like it.


Credits:
Music from #Uppbeat (free for Creators!):https://uppbeat.io/t/color-parade/pixel-playgroundLicense code: 6FICBZNYDBOLRCWN
Sound FX from Zapsplat.

game.title: Anglerfish Journey
game.short_text: A fish themed pixel art action shooter game.

details.title: Anglerfish Journey
details.description:
>>NOTE: The web version of the game might be a bit heavy for some browsers. If you experience lag or other issues with the web player, try downloading the executable version of the game.<<

Help a magical anglerfish defeat undead evil fish in this pixel art action shooter game.
Progress through 5 different areas, level up, and defeat the final boss.
This game was created as an entry for the Fishfest game jam.
CONTROLS
Movement: WASD or arrow keysMouse to aimLeft mouse button: shootRight mouse button: use fish powersESC: in-game menu
HOW TO PLAY
Defeat all the waves of enemies in each area to progressGain xp by killing enemies and by collecting xp pickupsEvery time you level up you'll be able to pick an upgrade among 3 random optionsCharged fish powers are shown as little fish rotating around the main character. The glowing indicates which one is going to be used next. There are 3 types of fish powers: healing (red fish), fish rocket (orange fish) and an area damage bubble that lasts for a few seconds (green fish). You start with 1 fish power slot, which means you'll only be able to charge 1 fish power at a time. By leveling up, sometimes you'll get the option to increase the available fish power slots, up to a maximum of 8.Fish powers gets charged when the mana bar is full or by collecting fish power bubbles. The mana bar recharges over time.

moreInfo.Author: The Pixelated Manatee

game.title: Fishmash Aquarium
game.short_text: Fish tank tycoon game.

details.title: Fishmash Aquarium
details.description:
Fishmash Aquarium is a fish tank simulation game. Feed the fish and they give you jewelry. Collect the jewelry to earn shells (money) and unlock fish and upgrades. Unlock all fish and you can finish the game. How fast can you reach the ending?
Game Rule (Fishmash mode)
Feed the fish by clicking on the fish tank. Be careful not to kill all the fish.Grown fish will drop collectibles and consumables.Some fish eat collectibles, some eat other fish.There might be some threats to the fishMix and match the fish to make more money and leave some choresBuy the trophy at the end to clear the Fishmash mode!
Planned
Current version only includes Fishmash™ mode which randomly unlocks fish and you have only one goal, buying the trophy to finish the game. The full version includes also FishLab (adventure mode), and FishZen (sandbox mode) mode. In FishLab you can mix and match the fish to fit the situation and discover various types of fish to unlock the entries in Codex Fishyius, which is the encyclopedia of Fishmash Aquarium. Once unlocked, the discovered fish are added into the Fishmash mode to help you clear the game. In FishZen, you can mix and match any kind of discovered fish and observe how they interact. You can also decorate and admire the FishZen tank with the decors unlocked by clearing Fishmash mode. Decors have difference unlock conditions, so that you can try mishmashed combinations of fish, hence Fishmash Aquarium. The full version of Fishmash Aquarium is planned to release in about late 2024.
Animations for fish (planned in 0.08)Fishmash modeMore fish and traits to unlock and help gameplayReward decors to use in FishZen modeFishLab modeStage clear and deck building mechanismGame save and continue
FishZen modeMix and match systemsInteractive behaviourDecorating the tankCodex FishyiusFish pagesDecor pagesHall of fame pages (leaderboard)Tutorials pagesMore background musicOptimisationsand more
Differences in Paid Version
Currently there's almost no difference in paid version. As a sign of patronage, you can change the username recorded in the leaderboard when you finish the game. There will be more features as the version upgrades. I promise I will show you appreciation.
You can change the username in the leaderboard.More features coming in later versions.
Supported Environment
Windows (recommended)
Browser (performance issue, sorry)
!!Warning!!: Read before downloading fishfest version (0.03)
I unfortunately didn't check the sound to be normalised in the fistfest jam version. And I have my sound settings lower than others. So there is an earrape issue. Be careful to lower your volume before playing it. There's no volume control feature and the music plays immediately after starting the game. (only applied to 0.03 version)
Disclaimer
All resources are hand crafted or properly licensed, however, there might be some assets created by others that inspired me. If some assets remind you of something you made and they discomfort you, please contact me.This game is an homage to the famous Insaniquarium! So there should be many things that are inspired by Insaniquarium. However, none of the assets are directly brought from Insaniquarium.
